summary: The implementation addresses all three core requirements: sport category images are displayed using SportCard components with proper loading states and error handling (REQ-1), academy locations are displayed with name and geographic coordinates via AcademyCard components with backend integration (REQ-2), and image references point to /assets/generated/ directory (REQ-3). However, there is no evidence in the diff that the actual image files were created or placed in the frontend/public/assets/generated directory. The code references the images but does not show their creation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate and store images in frontend/public/assets/generated directory
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows code referencing images from /assets/generated/ but does not show the creation or placement of the actual image files (basketball.dim_800x600.png, soccer.dim_800x600.png, tennis.dim_800x600.png, swimming.dim_800x600.png, volleyball.dim_800x600.png, academy-1.dim_600x400.png, academy-2.dim_600x400.png, academy-3.dim_600x400.png) in the frontend/public/assets/generated directory

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication system with login/logout functionality
hallucinated_features.reason: Authentication features including InternetIdentityProvider, useInternetIdentity hook, and actor-based authentication were implemented but not requested in the BuildRequest

hallucinated_features.description: Navigation menu with anchored links (Sports, Academies, About)
hallucinated_features.reason: Header component includes navigation links to sections that were not part of the requirements

hallucinated_features.description: initializePlaces mutation and backend place initialization
hallucinated_features.reason: The backend includes an initializePlaces function and useInitializePlaces hook for manually initializing data, which was not requested
